name: Site24x7 API
what_it_does: Full-stack cloud monitoring platform (Zoho product) with REST API for website uptime, APM, server, network, and log monitoring from 130+ global locations. Comprehensive alternative to Datadog at lower cost.
use_cases: Managing website and API uptime monitors programmatically across multiple regions
Querying server health metrics and alerting for infrastructure automation agents
APM performance data retrieval for SLA reporting and capacity planning
Cloud resource monitoring across AWS, Azure, and GCP from a single API
Log analytics querying for incident investigation automation
not_for: Code-level distributed tracing (use Datadog APM or Jaeger)
Organizations requiring Zoho data residency outside US/EU/IN/AU
best_when: An agent manages comprehensive full-stack monitoring (uptime + servers + cloud + logs) from a single vendor at mid-market pricing.
avoid_when: You need best-in-class APM with distributed tracing depth — use Datadog or New Relic instead.

auth.notes: OAuth2 with Zoho Accounts integration. Access tokens from Zoho Accounts OAuth flow. Token refresh required — 1-hour expiry. Data center selection required: US, EU, IN, AU, or CN endpoints.

pricing.paid_tiers: Starter from $9/month; Pro from $35/month; Enterprise from $99/month
pricing.notes: Zoho product with competitive pricing vs Datadog. Free tier available. Pricing scales with monitors and server agents. Strong value for mid-market monitoring needs.

performance.rate_limits: Not publicly documented; enterprise-grade rate limits

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API documentation available but less comprehensive than enterprise competitors. Error responses are JSON with error codes and messages. OAuth token management adds complexity for automation.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Monitor creation by name can produce duplicates. Updates by monitor ID are idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: OAuth2 token expires every hour — agents need automatic token refresh logic
Data center selection required — US/EU/IN/AU endpoints are separate accounts
Monitor ID format differs by monitor type — HTTP monitors vs server monitors have different schemas
API rate limits are not documented — implement exponential backoff for bulk operations

security_score_components.security_notes: SOC2, ISO 27001, GDPR, and HIPAA compliant. Multiple data residency regions. OAuth2 with Zoho Accounts. TLS enforced. Zoho is a major established vendor with enterprise security practices.
